# Copilot Instructions

## Repository Overview

This is a simple clone repository (`skills-copilot-codespaces-vscode`) used for learning and experimenting with GitHub Copilot, Codespaces, and VS Code. It currently contains minimal content.

## Repository Structure

- `README.md` — brief description of the repository
- `.github/copilot-instructions.md` — this file; repository-wide instructions for Copilot

## Working in This Repository

- There is no build system, test suite, or linting configuration in this repository.
- Changes are typically simple file additions or edits.
- Commit messages should be short and descriptive.
- Follow standard Markdown formatting for any `.md` files.

## General Guidelines

- Keep changes minimal and focused.
- Do not introduce unnecessary dependencies or tooling.
- Prefer clear, readable content over complexity.
